close_reason: RBAC guards already implemented - all AI routes have requirePermission() middleware applied with appropriate permissions (tasks:ai, tasks:read, tasks:update, admin:read)

title: Add IntegrationDefinition model to replace magic strings
close_reason: Added IntegrationDefinition model with IntegrationType enum, AuthType enum, and proper relations

title: Add RBAC to notification routes
close_reason: RBAC already properly implemented: 1) All notification routes protected by requirePermission() guards (notifications:read, notifications:manage, notifications:preferences, notifications:push), 2) Routes go through authMiddleware and tenantMiddleware at /api level, 3) All controller methods scope operations to authenticated user via getCurrentTenant().userId. No changes needed.

close_reason: All required indexes already exist in the schema. Verified: TaskNode (4 indexes), TaskHistory (1 index), TaskAIDecision (1 index), Notification (1 index), AuditLog (1 index), IntegrationWebhookEvent (1 index). Schema validated with pnpm db:generate.
